name: Tiandi Science & Technology Co.Ltd
summary: Tiandi Science & Technology Co.,Ltd engages in the mine production process automation, mechanization, information equipment development, manufacturing and system integration activities in China and internationally. It is also involved in the coal washing equipment development; manufacturing and general contracting of coal preparation plant engineering; storage and shipping loading equipment and engineering general contracting; underground special construction technology development and underground special engineering construction contracting; and provision of technical consultation and services, and coal mine management businesses. The company was founded in 2000 and is based in Beijing, China.
